title: Polish Avocado Tagine
description: A twist on traditional tagine, blending Polish flavors with creamy avocado. This dish is perfect for a unique dinner experience.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Polish sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken stock and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the diced avocado and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice, if desired.
